current_missing_for_retention: canonical-Higgs operator identity certificate accepted by audit

exact_next_action: Supply or derive an audit-acceptable canonical-Higgs operator certificate, run the harness with --source-higgs-cross-modes and --source-higgs-cross-noises, then build pole-residue rows for the source-Higgs certificate builder.

verdict: The production harness now has a default-off same-ensemble source-Higgs measurement path.  With a supplied operator certificate it can emit finite-mode C_ss/C_sH/C_HH rows for the selected FH/LSZ mass.  This is not retained closure: the current surface still lacks an accepted canonical-Higgs operator identity, pole residues, Gram purity, FV/IR control, and retained route authorization.
